dismissalText.commentary: Yashasvi Jaiswal c Starc b Ngidi 12 (9b 3x4 0x6 9m) SR: 133.33

dismissalComment.html: Almost out last ball, gone this time! Jaiswal's slump continues. 115ks cutter is full and nearly on the off-side tramline. Jaiswal didn't move across, reached out with his hands and looked to slap it over cover. Thick top edge went high to Starc's right at short third.

dismissalText.commentary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi c Miller b Tiwari 46 (21b 5x4 3x6 41m) SR: 219.04

dismissalComment.html: Shot checked.... and ball doesn't travel! Tiwari gets Sooryavanshi with a 129ks slot ball. Off-stump line, batter was on middle and off and went back in the crease for the straight drive. Played it too early, might have been better served going through with the shot. Miller slides to the right and takes it at long-off. He covered 24 metres, graphic shows. Pumps his fists, bowler's delighted too

dismissalText.commentary: Ravi Singh lbw b Starc 4 (2b 1x4 0x6 2m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: third wicket in four balls! Although Ravi has reviewed it for lbw. Top work from Starc to deceive the batter. He takes the pace off and sends down a cutter, Ravi is too early into his shot and the ball hits him right in front of middle and off, with the off stump clearly visible. No edge, going straight for the stumps and that's a review gone for RR
